scripts.dev: npm run build -w @wangwang/shared && npm run build -w @wangwang/onetalk-adapter && npm run build -w @wangwang/database && concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w @wangwang/api" "npm run dev -w @wangwang/web"
scripts.dev:api: npm run build -w @wangwang/shared && npm run build -w @wangwang/onetalk-adapter && npm run dev -w @wangwang/api
scripts.dev:server: npm run build -w @wangwang/database && npm run dev -w @wangwang/server
scripts.build: npm run build -w @wangwang/shared && npm run build -w @wangwang/onetalk-adapter && npm run build -w @wangwang/database && npm run build -w @wangwang/api && npm run build -w @wangwang/server && npm run build -w @wangwang/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @wangwang/shared && npm run build -w @wangwang/onetalk-adapter && npm run build -w @wangwang/database && npm run typecheck -w @wangwang/api && npm run typecheck -w @wangwang/server && npm run typecheck -w @wangwang/web
